ddls:
CREATE TABLE "test_cases" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test case */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the test case (e.g., OK, TIMEDOUT) */,
  "run_time" REAL /* Runtime of the test case in seconds */,
  "total_splits" INTEGER /* Total number of splits in the test case */,
  "boogie_dump_time" REAL /* Boogie dump time of the test case in seconds */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the test case (e.g., unit, integration, system) */,
  "complexity" TEXT /* Complexity level of the test case (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated software version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test case */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the test case was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the test case */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the test case was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES test_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "env_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test environment */,
  "env_name" TEXT /* Name of the test environment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test environment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the environment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the environment was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the environment */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the environment was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the environment (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("env_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case */,
  "env_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test environment */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date when the test case was executed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test case execution (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test result */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the test result was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the test result */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the test result was last modified */,
  "runtime_details" TEXT /* Detailed runtime information (e.g., CPU usage, memory usage) */,
  "total_splits_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about total splits */,
  "boogie_dump_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about Boogie dump time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_env_id FOREIGN KEY ("env_id") REFERENCES environments ("env_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each software version */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the software version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the software version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the software version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the software version was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the software version */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the software version was last modified */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the software version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the software version (e.g., released, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test dependency */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case */,
  "dependent_test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependent test case */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dependency */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the dependency was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the dependency */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the dependency was last modified */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., sequential, parallel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_dependencies_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_dependencies_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_dependencies_dependent_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_test_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_dependencies_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test resource */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the test resource */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test resource */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the resource */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the resource */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the resource (e.g., available, unavailable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_resource_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource usage record */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test resource */,
  "usage_amount" REAL /* Amount of resource usage (e.g., CPU time, memory usage) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the usage record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the usage record was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the usage record */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the usage record was last modified */,
  "usage_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about resource usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_resource_usage_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES test_resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_resource_usage_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_resource_usage_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_resource_usage_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., tester, developer, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the test case */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the test case was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the access record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the access record was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the access record */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the access record was last modified */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_access_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_access_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_access_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test result */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report file */,
  "report_size" REAL /* Size of the report file in MB */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the report */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was last modified */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_reports_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_reports_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date when the test case was executed */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the test case */,
  "run_time" REAL /* Runtime of the test case */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the historical record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the historical record was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the historical record */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the historical record was last modified */,
  "history_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the historical record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_history_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_history_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_history_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_id")
)
